sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16631" key="a)stroblhsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-βλησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, prob. l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-βολησία</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
